name: Grilled Potato Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the potato halves.
2. Let the mixture stand for 1 hour.
3. Boil the potato halves for about 15 minutes.
4. Brush the seasoned oil on top of each potato half.
5. Grill the potato halves for about 15 minutes or until slightly charred.
6. Do not cook over direct coals.
7. (Optional) Add 1 or 2 mesquite chunks to the coals for added flavor.
